title: Heracles For Blabber
description: Add Blabber dialogue support to Heracles
body:
## Feature
 - **Heracles** Chat task that dialogue will complete
 - **Heracles** Chat reward that can trigger a dialogue
    -  Will pass entity from entity interact, villagers interact, guards interact as interlocutor to Blabber
 - **Blabber** Complete task action `heracles-for-blabber:complete_task` that can mark a chat task need action as complete
